name: Karthik Sambandan
title: Senior Data Engineer | Technology Speaker
bio: A seasoned technology professional with nearly two decades of experience in data engineering, analytics, AI, cloud, and enterprise transformation.
topics: The Evolution of Data: From Traditional Systems to AI and Cloud
Building Modern Data Platforms for Enterprise Success
Real-World Data Engineering Use Cases Across Industries
Data Analytics and AI: Turning Information into Business Value
Lessons from Two Decades in IT
Data Architecture and Implementation Strategies
Technology Transformation Across Industries
travel: North America, international, and virtual events
feesDisplay: Base session: $200; custom subject session: starting at $500

name: Bohan Ni

name: Anthony Tang
title: Data Analyst | Cross-Border Trading Consultant
bio: A data and business professional helping technical audiences communicate clearly, build trust, and create opportunities across cultures and industries.

style: Passionate, energetic, personal, and highly relatable
feesDisplay: Student events: $0–$300; virtual: $250–$750; workshops: $500–$1,500; in-person keynote: $1,000–$2,500
